summary: Fixes the update modal copy flow when Codex blocks clipboard access.
updatePrompt: Update Planban from piercekearns/planban, verify the plugin and MCP tools are available, then reopen Planban in the Codex in-app browser.
changelogSummary: If clipboard access is blocked, Planban now shows the update prompt inside the modal so you can still select it or open a Codex draft.
